title: Fantastic Fried Brazilian Mozzarella Skewers
description: A tangy and light Brazilian dish featuring mozzarella cheese, double-fried for a crispy exterior and a cheesy interior, perfect as a snack or appetizer. This dish is ayurvedic-tamasic-friendly and offers a delightful cheese-pull experience.
instructions: In a shallow dish, mix together flour, cornstarch, salt, pepper, and brazilian-style seasoning.
In a separate dish, beat the eggs until well combined.
Dip each mozzarella cheese cube into the flour mixture, coating lightly, then into the eggs, and finally back into the flour mixture, pressing gently to adhere.
Heat 1 cup of vegetable oil in a deep frying pan to 350 degrees.
Double-fry the mozzarella cheese cubes in batches until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes per batch.
Using a slotted spoon, remove the fried mozzarella from the oil and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Increase the oil temperature to 375 degrees and fry the mozzarella cubes again in batches until crispy and golden brown, about 1-2 minutes per batch.
Thread 2-3 fried mozzarella cubes onto each skewer.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley or cilantro, if desired.
